meaning: n.刻痕,缺口vt.刻痕于,挑毛病vi.阻击
examples: I'm sorry, Nick, I got waylaid.
Nick went on the French exchange.
Nick steered them into the nearest seats.
Nick Black, DCCL chief executive officer, said contingency plans are in place to minimise disruption.
They eat at restaurants like Nick and Toni's or Della Femina in East Hampton.
